mapper.update:
UPDATE inbound_table SET inbound_status = '승인', inbound_date = NOW(), admin_id = #{adminId} WHERE inbound_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT stock_id AS stockId, stock_amount AS stockAmount, product_id AS productId, area_id AS areaId FROM stock_table WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND area_id = #{areaId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_table (product_id, area_id, stock_amount) VALUES (#{productId}, #{areaId}, #{amount})
mapper.select: SELECT inbound_id AS inboundId, inbound_request_date AS inboundRequestDate, inbound_status AS inboundStatus, inbound_amount AS inboundAmount, product_id AS productId, reject_reason_message AS rejectReasonMessage FROM inbound_table WHERE inbound_id = #{inboundId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, product_size AS productSize, storage_temperature AS storageTemperature FROM product WHERE product_id = #{productId}
